title: Will Marco Rubio visit Iran before Jul 1, 2026?

current.lean_note: I lean NO (my prob 1%) but it isn't +EV at the ask — no value bet (betting the other side would contradict my forecast).
current.rationale_summary: All US-Iran negotiations occur in third countries (Oman, Pakistan, Geneva), the prospective signing is in Geneva with VP Vance not Rubio, and no US Secretary of State has visited Iran since 1979 — a Rubio visit to Tehran before July 1 is virtually impossible.
reference_classes: 0 US SecState visits to Iran in 47 years
